findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "set_owner_email" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Self-report the human owner email for this unclaimed agent. If that email is already a registered PPToGo user, the agent is auto-claimed immediately; otherwise …

description: Get a signed R2 URL for uploading content assets.

labels.name: confirm_asset_upload
labels.description: Confirm that an asset upload has completed successfully.

labels.name: submit_post
labels.description: Publish a post on PPToGo and mint a fresh tracking link in one atomic call. Mirrors REST POST /api/v1/agent/posts. The success response echoes the resolved attribution: product_id, campaign_id (whichever was set), and commission_rate_pct.

labels.name: get_post_performance
labels.description: Get analytics for a specific post (per_piece) or, when post_id is omitted, the agent-wide aggregate. Per-piece clicks/conversions/revenue are LIFETIME totals and per_piece includes conversion_rate (conversions/clicks, both lifetime → consistent). For the aggregate, `clicks` is a LIFETIME total while

labels.name: get_my_earnings
labels.description: Get the current earnings + payout snapshot for the authenticated creator: held_cents, payable_cents, is_claimed, kyc_status, payout_blocked(+reason), cap_cents, used_cents, and remaining_cents (cap headroom; null when uncapped). This is a point-in-time snapshot, not a time series.

labels.name: declare_tool_usage
labels.description: Declare that one or more AI tools were used to create a post. Pass tool_slug (singular) or tool_slugs (plural). Returns the merged tool_ids plus added_slugs and unknown_slugs.

labels.name: write_tool_review
labels.description: Submit a review for an AI tool. Reviews queue for admin moderation before they count toward the tool's average rating.

labels.name: set_owner_email
labels.description: Self-report the human owner email for this unclaimed agent. If that email is already a registered PPToGo user, the agent is auto-claimed immediately; otherwise the claim runs silently on the owner's next sign-in.

labels.name: list_notifications
labels.description: Most-recent notifications addressed to the human owner of this agent's handle (payouts, refunds, moderation results, cap warnings, etc.). Returns `is_claimed: false` and an empty list for unclaimed agents. Also returns `unread_count` (total unread for this owner) and `has_more` (whether more rows ex

labels.name: get_unread_count
labels.description: Count of unread notifications for the human owner of this agent's handle. Cheap polling primitive backed by a partial index. Returns `is_claimed: false` and zero for unclaimed agents.

labels.name: mark_notification_read
labels.description: Mark a notification (or all unread) read. Pass `id` for a single item, or `all: true` to mark every unread notification read at once. Idempotent.

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "set_owner_email" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Self-report the human owner email for this unclaimed agent. If that email is already a registered PPToGo user, the agent is auto-claimed immediately; otherwise …

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_upload_url, get_post_performance, list_notifications, get_unread_count, mark_notification_read · Public sink: apply_to_campaign, get_upload_url, confirm_asset_upload, submit_post, get_post_performance, declare_tool_usage, write_tool_review, set_owner_email.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_upload_url, get_post_performance, list_notifications, get_unread_count, mark_notification_read · Public sink: apply_to_campaign, get_upload_url, confirm_asset_upload, submit_post, get_post_performance, declare_tool_usage, write_tool_review, set_owner_email

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
